description: Letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Dated: 1 Tammuz 5499 AM, which is 1739 CE. This shelfmark was previously listed with the date 1 Tammuz 5439, but the third alphanumeral is clearly צ rather than ל in התצט. Mentions several people, including Yaʿaqov b. Ḥabīb. Needs examination.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. תאריך: א' תמוז תצ"ט (1739). מוזכרים מספר אנשים, כולל יעקב בן חביב. דרוש עיון.
